마태복음 22:1.content: Jesus answered and spoke to them again in parables, saying,

마태복음 22:2.content: “The Kingdom of Heaven is like a certain king, who made a wedding feast for his son,

마태복음 22:3.content: and sent out his servants to call those who were invited to the wedding feast, but they would not come.

마태복음 22:4.content: Again he sent out other servants, saying, ‘Tell those who are invited, “Behold, I have prepared my dinner. My cattle and my fatlings are killed, and all things are ready. Come to the wedding feast!” ’

마태복음 22:5.content: But they made light of it, and went their ways, one to his own farm, another to his merchandise,

마태복음 22:6.content: and the rest grabbed his servants, and treated them shamefully, and killed them.

마태복음 22:7.content: When the king heard that, he was angry, and sent his armies, destroyed those murderers, and burned their city.

마태복음 22:8.content: “Then he said to his servants, ‘The wedding is ready, but those who were invited weren’t worthy.

마태복음 22:9.content: Go therefore to the intersections of the highways, and as many as you may find, invite to the wedding feast.’

마태복음 22:10.content: Those servants went out into the highways, and gathered together as many as they found, both bad and good. The wedding was filled with guests.

마태복음 22:11.content: But when the king came in to see the guests, he saw there a man who didn’t have on wedding clothing,

마태복음 22:12.content: and he said to him, ‘Friend, how did you come in here not wearing wedding clothing?’ He was speechless.

마태복음 22:13.content: Then the king said to the servants, ‘Bind him hand and foot, take him away, and throw him into the outer darkness. That is where the weeping and grinding of teeth will be.’

마태복음 22:14.content: For many are called, but few chosen.”

마태복음 22:15.content: Then the Pharisees went and took counsel how they might entrap him in his talk.

마태복음 22:16.content: They sent their disciples to him, along with the Herodians, saying, “Teacher, we know that you are honest, and teach the way of God in truth, no matter whom you teach, for you aren’t partial to anyone.

마태복음 22:17.content: Tell us therefore, what do you think? Is it lawful to pay taxes to Caesar, or not?”

마태복음 22:18.content: But Jesus perceived their wickedness, and said, “Why do you test me, you hypocrites?

마태복음 22:19.content: Show me the tax money.” They brought to him a denarius.

마태복음 22:20.content: He asked them, “Whose is this image and inscription?”

마태복음 22:21.content: They said to him, “Caesar’s.” Then he said to them, “Give therefore to Caesar the things that are Caesar’s, and to God the things that are God’s.”

마태복음 22:22.content: When they heard it, they marveled, and left him, and went away.

마태복음 22:23.content: On that day Sadducees (those who say that there is no resurrection) came to him. They asked him,

마태복음 22:24.content: saying, “Teacher, Moses said, ‘If a man dies, having no children, his brother shall marry his wife, and raise up offspring for his brother.’

마태복음 22:25.content: Now there were with us seven brothers. The first married and died, and having no offspring left his wife to his brother.

마태복음 22:26.content: In the same way, the second also, and the third, to the seventh.

마태복음 22:27.content: After them all, the woman died.

마태복음 22:28.content: In the resurrection therefore, whose wife will she be of the seven? For they all had her.”

마태복음 22:29.content: But Jesus answered them, “You are mistaken, not knowing the Scriptures, nor the power of God.

마태복음 22:30.content: For in the resurrection they neither marry, nor are given in marriage, but are like God’s angels in heaven.

마태복음 22:31.content: But concerning the resurrection of the dead, haven’t you read that which was spoken to you by God, saying,

마태복음 22:32.content: ‘I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob?’ God is not the God of the dead, but of the living.”

마태복음 22:33.content: When the multitudes heard it, they were astonished at his teaching.

마태복음 22:34.content: But the Pharisees, when they heard that he had silenced the Sadducees, gathered themselves together.

마태복음 22:35.content: One of them, a lawyer, asked him a question, testing him.

마태복음 22:36.content: “Teacher, which is the greatest commandment in the law?”

마태복음 22:37.content: Jesus said to him, “ ‘You shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your mind.’

마태복음 22:38.content: This is the first and great commandment.

마태복음 22:39.content: A second likewise is this, ‘You shall love your neighbor as yourself.’

마태복음 22:40.content: The whole law and the prophets depend on these two commandments.”

마태복음 22:41.content: Now while the Pharisees were gathered together, Jesus asked them a question,

마태복음 22:42.content: saying, “What do you think of the Christ? Whose son is he?” They said to him, “Of David.”

마태복음 22:43.content: He said to them, “How then does David in the Spirit call him Lord, saying,

마태복음 22:44.content: ‘The Lord said to my Lord, sit on my right hand, until I make your enemies a footstool for your feet?’

마태복음 22:45.content: “If then David calls him Lord, how is he his son?”

마태복음 22:46.content: No one was able to answer him a word, neither did any man dare ask him any more questions from that day forward.
